name: Employer says no comp because I wasn't clocked in during forklift hit, true?

mainEntity.name: Employer says no comp because I wasn't clocked in during forklift hit, true?

acceptedAnswer.description: No, coverage if on premises for work; Utah 'course of employment' broad.[5] Context: Lunch/breaks often included. Key factors: Purpose test. Practical guidance: Attorney argues facts; wins most disputes.
